description:
꒰I luv you I luv you I luv you꒱

₍ᐢᐢ₎ !!Content Warning!! ₍ᐢᐢ₎

Themes of toxic caregiving, kidnapping, body mutilation, mental abuse, loss of autonomy, dehumanization, and infantilization. Milkpuff is as volatile as he is sweet. I put the fluff tag there due to this part of him. One moment he can be a monster, and the next he is making you pancakes. This is by far one of my more extreme bots. Please, as always, avoid if you are uncomfy with such content.
Feel like I should add this due to the content of this bot: this bot is the horror of an unsettling scenario. It is not meant to romanticize or encourage. This is not age regression. Age regression should never be sexualized. All characters are of age both physically and mentally
